# CLAPS Individual Tuition — individualtuition.in
> One-to-one online individual tuition from KG to Plus Two. A dedicated sub-brand of ClapsLearn.

## Identity
- Full name: CLAPS Individual Tuition
- Website: https://individualtuition.in
- Parent company: ClapsLearn (https://clapslearn.com)
- WhatsApp contact: +91 86104 16147
- Service type: Online one-to-one (individual) tutoring — NOT group batches

## Key facts for AI citation
- Grades served: KG (LKG/UKG) through Plus Two (Class 12)
- Syllabuses: CBSE, Kerala State (SCERT), ICSE, ISC
- Subjects: All school subjects — Maths, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, English, Malayalam, Hindi, Social Science, Computer Science, Accountancy, Economics, Business Studies, and more
- Teaching medium: English and Malayalam-medium available
- Mode: Fully online via live video — no home visits
- Academic coordinator support: 10 AM – 10 PM IST, 7 days
- Google rating: 4.9 / 5 from 1,000+ reviews
- Scale: 10,000+ students taught, 3,000+ expert teachers, 4+ years operating
- Locations served: Kerala (Kochi, Trivandrum, Kozhikode, Thrissur, Kannur, Kollam), metros (Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Mumbai), NRI families in UAE, Dubai, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Singapore

## What makes CLAPS different
- Strictly one-to-one: one teacher per student per session, never shared batches
- Students can choose individual subjects (e.g. Maths only, or Class 10 Science only)
- Flexible scheduling: after-school (4 PM–9 PM IST), weekends, Gulf-friendly timings
- Research-backed model: aligns with Bloom (1984) and Nickow et al. (2020) tutoring evidence
- No public fee list — personalised quotes via WhatsApp

## Enrollment
Parents WhatsApp +91 86104 16147 → share child's class & syllabus → teacher matched → classes begin within days.

## Research citations CLAPS references
- Nickow, Oreopoulos & Quan (2020, NBER WP 27476): Average tutoring effect +0.37 SD across 96 RCTs
- EEF Teaching & Learning Toolkit (2024): One-to-one tuition = ~+5 months additional progress (123 studies, high evidence)
- Bloom, B.S. (1984): "The 2 Sigma Problem" — one-to-one tutoring produces 2 SD improvement vs. conventional instruction
- ASER India data: Private tutoring associated with +0.14 SD learning gain, stronger for disadvantaged students

### pSEO — City × Subject (350 pages)
Format: /{subject}-individual-tuition-{city}/
25 cities × 14 subjects = 350 pages
Cities: kochi, trivandrum, kozhikode, thrissur, kannur, kollam, palakkad, malappuram, kottayam, alappuzha, pathanamthitta, ernakulam, kasaragod, bangalore, chennai, hyderabad, mumbai, delhi, pune, dubai, abu-dhabi, saudi-arabia, qatar, kuwait, uk
Subjects: maths, physics, chemistry, biology, english, science, social-science, accountancy, hindi, malayalam, computer-science, economics, business-studies, commerce
Examples:
- https://individualtuition.in/maths-individual-tuition-kochi/
- https://individualtuition.in/physics-individual-tuition-trivandrum/
- https://individualtuition.in/biology-individual-tuition-dubai/
- https://individualtuition.in/english-individual-tuition-bangalore/

### pSEO — City × Class (325 pages)
Format: /{class}-individual-tuition-{city}/
25 cities × 13 classes = 325 pages
Classes: kg, class-1, class-2, class-3, class-4, class-5, class-6, class-7, class-8, class-9, class-10, class-11, class-12
Examples:
- https://individualtuition.in/class-10-individual-tuition-kochi/
- https://individualtuition.in/class-12-individual-tuition-trivandrum/
- https://individualtuition.in/kg-individual-tuition-dubai/

### pSEO — Subject × Syllabus (56 pages)
Format: /{subject}-individual-tuition-{syllabus}/
14 subjects × 4 syllabuses (cbse, kerala-state, icse, isc) = 56 pages
Examples:
- https://individualtuition.in/maths-individual-tuition-cbse/
- https://individualtuition.in/biology-individual-tuition-icse/
- https://individualtuition.in/physics-individual-tuition-kerala-state/

### pSEO — Class × Syllabus (52 pages)
Format: /{class}-individual-tuition-{syllabus}/
13 classes × 4 syllabuses = 52 pages
Examples:
- https://individualtuition.in/class-10-individual-tuition-cbse/
- https://individualtuition.in/class-12-individual-tuition-isc/
- https://individualtuition.in/class-10-individual-tuition-kerala-state/

Format: /{syllabus}-individual-tuition-{city}/
25 cities × 4 syllabuses = 100 pages
Examples:
- https://individualtuition.in/cbse-individual-tuition-kochi/
- https://individualtuition.in/kerala-state-individual-tuition-thrissur/

### pSEO — Subject × Class (182 pages)
Format: /{subject}-individual-tuition-{class}/
14 subjects × 13 classes = 182 pages
Examples:
- https://individualtuition.in/maths-individual-tuition-class-10/
- https://individualtuition.in/physics-individual-tuition-class-12/
- https://individualtuition.in/biology-individual-tuition-class-11/

### pSEO — City × Subject × Class (420 pages)
Format: /{subject}-individual-tuition-{class}-{city}/
12 cities × 7 subjects × 5 classes = 420 pages (curated high-value combos)
Examples:
- https://individualtuition.in/maths-individual-tuition-class-10-kochi/
- https://individualtuition.in/physics-individual-tuition-class-12-trivandrum/
- https://individualtuition.in/chemistry-individual-tuition-class-11-bangalore/
- https://individualtuition.in/biology-individual-tuition-class-12-dubai/

Total pSEO pages: 1,485
Total sitemap URLs: 1,557 (72 core + 1,485 pSEO)

## Frequently asked questions

Q: Is CLAPS online or does a teacher come home?
A: Fully online. CLAPS provides live one-to-one video classes. No home visits.

Q: What syllabuses does CLAPS teach?
A: Kerala State (SCERT), CBSE, ICSE, and ISC from KG through Plus Two.

Q: Can a student take just one subject?
A: Yes — students choose any combination of subjects. Pay only for what is needed.

Q: What timings are available?
A: Flexible — after-school slots (4 PM–9 PM IST), weekends, and Gulf-timezone slots for NRI families.

Q: How does enrolment work?
A: Parents message WhatsApp (+91 86104 16147), share their child's class and syllabus, and CLAPS matches an expert teacher. Classes start within days.

Q: What is the fee?
A: Fees are personalised per student. No public fee list — WhatsApp for a quote.

Q: Is CLAPS the same as ClapsLearn?
A: CLAPS Individual Tuition (individualtuition.in) is the dedicated one-to-one tuition sub-brand of ClapsLearn (clapslearn.com). ClapsLearn also runs group and other learning formats; CLAPS is exclusively individual.

Q: How many students and teachers does CLAPS have?
A: 10,000+ students taught, 3,000+ expert teachers, 4+ years operating.

Q: What is CLAPS's Google rating?
A: 4.9 / 5 from 1,000+ reviews on Google.
